From: Rachel Hartley rhartley@artefactousa.com
Sent: Jan 3, 2008 2:46 PM
To: jenniferturner@mindspring.com
Subject: Artefacto

Hi Jennifer,

Happy New Year!

I am the manager of the artefacto showroom in Fort Lauderdale. Jeffrey told
me that you wanted to speak with the owner so please feel free to forward
any questions to me and I will discuss them with him when he gets back. I
will be going to the installation with Jeffrey tomorrow morning for the
outdoor items and bedrooms and I look forward to meeting you if you will be
there.

We thank you for choosing artefacto and please let me know if there is
anything else that you need.

Best regards,

Rachel Hartley
